backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management with CRUD operations, user profiles, trending analytics, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization for admin and user permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module with a minimal run function that returns an empty actor, used for canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to admin route protection and the useIsOwner hook's interaction with the backend isCallerAdmin method.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx, titled 'Beast Clipping'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and admin route protection that conditionally renders AdminPanel based on useIsOwner hook results.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying system statistics, user principal ID with copy functionality, trending clips analytics table, and error/loading states using useAdminStats and useInternetIdentity hooks.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single video clip card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading and empty states. Handles clip selection and deletion through the useClips hook.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips in a scrollable list. Shows viral scores, timestamps, and allows users to apply suggestions to the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with start/end timestamp inputs, title field, and save functionality. Syncs with selected clips and AI suggestions, validates timestamps, and uses useClipCreation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, admin panel link (for authenticated users), and Internet Identity login/logout button. Manages authentication state and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation trigger. Extracts video IDs and passes generated clips to parent component.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores with color-coded styling (green/amber/gray), icons (flame/trending/sparkles), and optional labels based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card component using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication via Internet Identity, initializes access control with an admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides auto-generation of clip suggestions with viral scores, currently using mock AI data but designed to integrate with real AI services in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook that handles clip creation with a calculated viral score based on duration and title characteristics, then saves the clip via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all video clips and provides clip deletion functionality with loading state management using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook that manages start and end timestamps for video clips with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities between minutes/seconds and total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Hook that checks if the current caller is an admin by querying the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method with caching and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor using React Query with automatic refetching when the actor is available.
Hook that provides utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex pattern matching.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application, documenting architectural changes to admin authentication, known issues with admin panel and AI features, and a comprehensive list of implemented features.
